items.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users

items.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
items.summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.
items.title_es: La primera ley criptográfica integral de Rusia está a dos votos de ser aprobada
